description: Unleash your compassionate side with our heartwarming email template designed to promote pet adoption. This template is perfect for events like National Pet Day, encouraging animal lovers to bring home a new furry friend. With its sleek dark mode design, it effortlessly blends sentiment with style, appealing to all pet enthusiasts. Whether you're an animal care organization or a pet-friendly business, this email template speaks volumes about the love and companionship that pets bring into our lives. Remember, adopting a pet not only saves a life but also opens up shelter space for another animal who might desperately need it. So, spread the word and make a difference with our pet adoption email template.
short_description: Promote pet adoption with our heartwarming email template, ideal for National Pet Day events. With a sleek dark mode design, it appeals to pet enthusiasts. Ideal for animal care organizations and pet-friendly businesses. Adopt, save a life, and make a difference.

designer.description: Hello, I'm Luana, a graphic and web designer with 8+ years of experience, specializing in email and landing page design. My approach is marked by precision, proactive problem-solving, and strong collaboration. I create visually impactful designs that align with marketing strategies, including social media graphics, blog covers, and presentations. I also offer custom design services tailored to clients' unique needs.

html_data:
YOU CAN'T BUY LOVE...

...but you can rescue it!

ADOPT NOW
 

National Pet Day

Saving one pet will not change the world,

but for that one pet, it will.

11 april 2022

9:00 AM - 6:00 PM

SAVE THE DATE
 

START A STORY. ADOPT!

Search to find
your new best friend.

There are likely hundreds of adoptable pets in your local animal shelters or rescues right now who would love to join your family Helping vulnerable animals and keeping pets in safe and loving homes requires a commitment from all of us.

ADOPT NOW
 
 

WHO WE ARE

Discover our mission

 

Create a positive and progressive culture for rescue

We want to improve the rescue and adoption experience for everyone and believe that the best way to achieve this is by creating and nurturing a positive and progressive culture for rescue.

DISCOVER MORE
 
 

Unite to save lives

We unite pets with new families, rescue groups with adopters and foster carers, corporate partners with a national rescue community, and we unite all passionate advocates for rescue pets to drive positive change.

 

Join our big, hairy, audacious mission to create a future where every pet is safe, respected and loved.

JOIN US
 

HOW TO DO

Adopt a Pet Service

 

REGISTER
